title: STPINEXT Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: STPINEXT Recruitment 2026: STPINEXT has released the official notification for Chief Operating Officer (COO) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Assam. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.
last_date: 20 days from the date of publication

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 20 days from the date of publication

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Below 45 years (relaxation permissible for deserving candidates)
age_limit.details: Chief Operating Officer (COO): Below 45 years. Relaxation permissible for deserving candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's in Technology/Engineering or Master in Technology/Engineering/Science or MBA. Minimum 8 years of overall experience in IT industry, start-up ecosystem as co-founder/founder/CxO or as an enabler of Start-up, Innovation & entrepreneurship ecosystem.
qualification.details: Chief Operating Officer (COO): Bachelor's in Technology/Engineering (or equivalent degree) or Master in Technology/Engineering/Science or MBA from a recognized, accredited and reputed institute/university. Minimum 8 years of overall experience in the IT industry, start-up ecosystem as co-founder/founder/CxO and/or as an enabler of Start-up, Innovation & entrepreneurship ecosystem by virtue of managing/leading/scaling reputed Innovation & start-up promoting organizations/ incubators/ accelerators/ centres-of-entrepreneurship/ entrepreneurship development cells / mentoring organization etc.

salary_details.details: Chief Operating Officer (COO): Rs. 1,50,000/- per month. Relaxation as per industry standards permissible for deserving candidates subjected to provisions in DPR.

selection_process: Screening by a duly constituted ‘Screening Committee' Personal interview before the duly constituted 'Search-cum-Selection Committee' Recommendation by the Search-cum-Selection Committee
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the STPINEXT Chief Operating Officer (COO) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20 days from the date of publication.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of STPINEXT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the STPINEXT Chief Operating Officer (COO) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 18 June 2026. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for the exact date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Chief Operating Officer (COO) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's in Technology/Engineering or Master in Technology/Engineering/Science or MBA from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum experience required for this position?
faq.answer: A minimum of 8 years of overall experience in the IT industry or start-up ecosystem is required, either as a co-founder, founder, CxO, or as an enabler of the start-up ecosystem.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Chief Operating Officer (COO) post?
faq.answer: The age limit is below 45 years, with relaxation permissible for deserving candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Chief Operating Officer (COO) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 1,50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Chief Operating Officer (COO) role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves screening by a committee, followed by a personal interview before a search-cum-selection committee.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or contract position?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Assam apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification mentions applications are invited from eligible candidates in Assam. It is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications will be invited and submitted through the online mode only.
